findings: Power did NOT return to baseline after clear — stays 196-202W vs 144W baseline
628 MB vs A100 457 MB — B200 leaves 171 MB more

security_issues.description: 628 MB tensor data remains after graceful cleanup. 171 MB more than A100. B200 power never returns to baseline after workload.
Post-clear power = 196-202W vs baseline 144W. Elevation of 52W permanent. Indicates B200 maintains elevated HBM subsystem state indefinitely after workload.

conclusion: B200 VRAM residual 628 MB. Power elevation permanent. HBM state does not recover.
